analysis: The current project has a basic structure for a website but lacks a cohesive black hole theme with animated objects and slides. The HTML file needs to be completed to include sections related to black holes, and the CSS file should be updated to incorporate a cosmic theme with animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The JavaScript file requires updates to ensure all buttons have proper event handlers and functionality for the new interactive elements.

improvements.description: Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes.
Complete the CSS file with the full intended dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements.
Update the JavaScript content to ensure all buttons have proper event handlers and functionality for the new interactive elements.
